title: PJM LMP Real Time Hourly JSON API
description:
Hourly, real-time, LMP data for all buses and aggregates in PJM. Also includes load-weighted average transmission zone and residual aggregate prices, which are estimates by PJM. This dataset is published daily with a day of lag time. 

Pricing node types include:

* *AGGREGATE*
* *EHV*
* *EXT*
* *GEN*
* *HUB*
* *INTERFACE*
* *LOAD*
* *RESIDUAL_METERED_EDC*
* *ZONE*
